calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Authorization To Transfer Community Property
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Theresa Miller.

Ms. Fox stated that the petition is necessary so that the property is not lost in foreclosure, that Ms. Miller can't keep up the property without her Husband's funds and that an additional creditor's lien was filed against the property last week. Ms. Fox also stated that the property needs to be sold so that Ms. Miller can move to Novato to be closer to her Husband and provide care, and that without this petition, Mr. Miller will not qualify for Medi-Cal. The Court granted the Petition for Authorization to Transfer Community Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Authorization To Transfer Community Property
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Aug-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
